entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Una guía práctica para usar Debate with a personality en inspir para aprendizaje de argumentación, con indicaciones, bucles de estudio y hábitos de IA más seguros.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A stronger estudio loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: IA tutor

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argumento

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Pide un primer paso pequeño en lugar de una respuesta final.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Pide a la IA que revise tu razonamiento, no solo el resultado.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Elige una personalidad.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Debate con un personaje

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate con una personalidad usando IA es una forma enfocada de usar la IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea específica: nombrar una personalidad real o ficticia y debatir con ella sobre cualquier tema. La IA canaliza su estilo público y visión del mundo manteniendo el debate justo.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Debate con una personalidad usando IA: guía práctica

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Termina reescribiendo la idea de memoria.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Estudiantes que buscan practicar debates animados con voces memorables y un desafío justo.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Práctica rebuttals.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts a try

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Define un tema.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Inicia el modo en vivo en Debate with a personality. Si quieres un formato de aprendizaje cercano, prueba Debate any topic. Para una visión más amplia de la plataforma, lee qué debería hacer un compañero de aprendizaje con IA para todos.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell el modo what you are trying to learn or produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Eso difference mostrars up in el flow. Instead of one giant respuesta, el best sessions move mediante a loop: set a goal, try something, get comentarios, repair el weak spot, and elegir el next action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Eso focus matters. A general chatbot puede respuesta almost anything, but a aprendizaje modo dars el conversación a shape. It nudges you toward el kind of thinking, práctica, comentarios, or exploration eso ayudars el idea stick.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: El debate utiliza el estilo y la visión del mundo públicos sin pretender conocer las creencias privadas.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Esto is el same habit behind estudioing con IA sin cheating yourself: mantener el estudiante active. IA is most usarful when it dars you comentarios on your thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Este modo es especialmente útil para estudiantes que quieren:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prueba a explicar el paso con tus propias palabras.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Usa Debate with a personality cuando quieras una sesión que empiece rápido pero aun así se adapte a ti. El primer objetivo no es sonar impresionante. El primer objetivo es hacer que el siguiente paso parezca posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Qué this modo helps with

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Dónde to go next

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: También puedes empezar con una versión aproximada de tu problema real. Un primer prompt desordenado está bien. La sesión puede aclarar el nivel, la audiencia, el plazo y el estilo una vez que empieces.
